name: Descent to Stark unit bottleneck for the d=19 branch (F-arm)

phase_0.domain_name: Descent to Stark unit bottleneck for the d=19 branch (F-arm)
phase_0.boundary_condition: The d=19 Hilbert space C^19 sealed by Zauner symmetry and the Crystal constraint manifold

VINIT.justification: Void state before any fiducial vector is named or the conjecture is resolved

TANCH.justification: Closed system boundary containing the full 144-element SIC projector set

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism toward the Zauner fiducial vector generating the tight frame

AREV.justification: Reverse morphism descending into arithmetic structure to locate the Stark unit regulator

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of the displacement operators with the arithmetic constraint

IMSCRIB.justification: Identity morphism where the measurement space imscribes itself through the generating vector

FSPLIT.justification: Branches the conjecture into the proven structural symmetry path and the unproven arithmetic descent path

FFUSE.justification: Reunites structural symmetry and arithmetic constraint to recover the full d=19 search space

EVALT.justification: Affirmative evaluation where structural symmetry successfully constrains the frame

EVALF.justification: Negative evaluation where arithmetic obstruction halts fiducial construction

ENGAGR.justification: Both symmetry and obstruction held simultaneously without resolution

IFIX.justification: Permanent append-only fixation of the unproven status and Lean scaffold attempt

phase_3.void_description: Unproven d=19 conjecture, potential fiducial not yet realized or constrained
phase_3.true_description: Zauner symmetry successfully fixes the subspace, structural frame complete and tight
phase_3.false_description: Stark unit obstruction halts descent, arithmetic bottleneck prevents fiducial construction
phase_3.both_description: d=19 simultaneously exhibits exact structural symmetry and unresolved arithmetic obstruction (paradice)

steps.domain_action: Initialize the d=19 SIC conjecture void state before any fiducial is named
Forward morphism toward the Zauner fiducial vector via Weyl-Heisenberg displacement
Branch the d=19 search into structural symmetry (T-arm) and arithmetic descent (F-arm)
T-arm forward morphism through the proven Zauner fixed subspace
T-arm affirmative evaluation — structural symmetry successfully constrains the frame
F-arm reverse descent into the ray class field arithmetic structure
F-arm negative evaluation — Stark unit bottleneck detected, halting fiducial construction
Fuse structural frame and arithmetic constraint back into the complete d=19 Hilbert space
Compose the fused system with the Stark unit regulator to form the joint outcome space
Enter paradice state — hold both exact symmetry and unresolved obstruction simultaneously
Self-reference the fiducial vector as the system's identity morphism and generating seed
Permanently record the unproven status, numerical evidence, and Lean proof attempt
Anchor the closed d=19 Hilbert space boundary, sealing the system

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Lean 4 proof assistant translating conjecture into formal logical operations
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Symbolic algebra and numerical linear algebra libraries exchanging tensor and field data
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Cached fiducial vectors, ray class field regulators, and frame potential metrics
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: L-BFGS-B optimization routine prioritizing frame potential minimization and descent steps
phase_5.alfs_store: The Imscribing Grammar Crystal of Types and CL8NK navigator catalog

phase_6.cycle_cost: Computational precision and symbolic derivation steps
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Unconstrained d=19 Hilbert space with potential SIC states
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Constrained d=19 system with fixed Zauner symmetry and identified Stark bottleneck
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The SIC measurement is information-theoretically complete; no structural information is lost in the descent to the bottleneck

  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑱 𐑠)  -- [9] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Enter paradice state — hold both exact symmetry and unresolved obstruction si...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑳 𐑭)  -- [10] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Self-reference the fiducial vector as the system's identity morphism and gene...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑠 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Permanently record the unproven status, numerical evidence, and Lean proof at...)
